bead.title: bug: endpoint and model policy still runs inside DDx service adapter
bead.description:
Review finding from fresh-eyes review.
File: cli/internal/agent/serviceconfig.go:238
Category: integration
Severity: high
Description: DDx's service adapter filters configured endpoints by probing /models before constructing the upstream service config, synthesizes profile mappings from BuiltinCatalog, and infers thinking-model request timeouts from model names. These are provider/model policy decisions in DDx, not neutral execution intent.
Suggested fix: Pass endpoint configuration through to upstream without live filtering or model-class inference. Keep only explicit user timeout values and status-only configured-provider snapshots. Delete DDx profile mappings from BuiltinCatalog/capabilities on execution paths.
bead.acceptance: NewServiceFromWorkDir does not filter endpoints by /models reachability; execution paths do not use BuiltinCatalog/ProfileMappings/isThinkingModel for routing policy; tests assert unreachable endpoints are passed to agent service and surfaced by status, not removed by DDx.
